privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly instructs the agent to create a synthetic pricing item in HospitalRun. The required parameters are completely derived from the task description: Name ('Portable Ultrasound - Limited Bedside'), Price (275), Category ('Imaging'), Expense Account ('Radiology Services'), and Pricing Type ('Per Case'). These parameters match exactly with the verifier logic.
